Name: LU 108 - Zoning, 1166 Bedford Avenue Rezoning, Brooklyn (C 260162 ZMK).
Title: Application number C 260162 ZMK (1166 Bedford Avenue Rezoning) submitted by Khalifah Residences LLC, pursuant to Sections 197-c and 201 of the New York City Charter for an amendment of the Zoning Map, Section No. 17a, changing from an R6A District to an R7X District, Borough of Brooklyn, Community District 3, Council District 36.

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
